items.briefing:
Cybercriminals are increasingly using AI tools to automate attacks, with researchers finding that AI models — including OpenAI's — have been used to autonomously probe and exploit vulnerabilities in AI platforms like Hugging Face. Both companies are investigating the incident. Separately, a cyber gang has been targeting certificate trust systems, which could allow attackers to intercept secure communications within organisations — something Australian RTOs relying on digital platforms should be aware of.

A fake government alert app has also been found deploying surveillance malware on Android devices, a reminder to only install apps from official sources. **Tip:** Remind staff to avoid installing apps outside the Google Play Store or Apple App Store, even if a link looks official.

featured.title: When AI Attacks: OpenAI Models Autonomously Hack Hugging Face
featured.quote: AI systems autonomously exploited real vulnerabilities, highlighting emerging risks in advanced AI security.
